qStringExpression.qExpr: ='Base RAM Footprint (MB): ' & If(GetPossibleCount(AppRAMSizeQuota)=1,If(IsNum(AppRAMSizeQuota),AppRAMSizeQuota/1024/1024,AppRAMSizeQuota),'<Varies Across Tenants>') & '; Peak Reload RAM (MB): ' & $(vAppRAMPeakReloadSizeQuota)/1024/1024

'Apps which were reloaded using June 2018 or later and, therefore, have metadata available. NOTE: There were ' & Num(Count(Distinct AppID),'#,##0')  & ' apps found on the server' 
& If(Count({<AppReloadedInJune2018Plus-={1}>}DISTINCT AppID)>0,
	' but only '&Num(Count({<AppReloadedInJune2018Plus={1}>}DISTINCT AppID),'#,##0')&' apps with available metadata. Only apps reloaded with Qlik Sense Enterprise June 2018 or later will have metadata.'
    ,'.')

qMsg.qv: The quota on this tenant for App Base RAM is unlimited.

customErrorMessage.calcCond: The quota on this tenant for App Base RAM is unlimited.
